frame_analyses.description: Grasper holds gauze at a corner near starting point of the cut.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good gauze stabilization, optimal position for initial cut.

frame_analyses.description: Scissors begin the initial cut along the marked line.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial cut appears accurate and stable.

frame_analyses.description: Continues cutting clockwise along the top half of the circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, stays close to the line.

frame_analyses.description: Cutting back along the lower side of the circle counterclockwise.

penalties_observed.description: Cut deviated outward by approximately 2 mm

frame_analyses.description: Final cut detaching the gauze piece from the rest.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean removal of cut piece, minimal tissue damage.

penalties.description: Deviated outward approximately 2 mm at 3 o'clock position

confidence_rationale: Majority of the cuts were clearly visible, with only minor deviations. Completion time and deviation measurement were easy to assess.
technique_summary: Overall excellent performance with precise cutting technique and minor deviation at one point.
strengths: Fast, precise initial and continuous cuts.
Stable grasp and efficient handling of gauze.
improvement_suggestions: Minimize deviation at critical points, enhancing visual control or adjusting grip.
